name: op_partial_repaint_incremental
description: PARTIAL REPAINT (incremental, not full-frame): the strongest scope check. After recoloring ONE small .box (node 7, 60x40 inside a 400x300 window), assert_damage_incremental requires the paint damage to be NEITHER full NOR none AND to cover no more than max_area_ratio of the window — i.e. a genuine patch, not a full redraw wearing a partial-damage hat. The box is ~2% of the window, so 0.2 is a very loose ceiling that still fails a full-frame repaint. assert_damage_covers_changes adds soundness. DOM mirrors e2e/bug-dom-mutation-no-damage.json so node id 7 is a stable .box.
